tours.pageSubtitle: Monitor tour catalog, status and key operational fields.

destinationSelect.hint: Type at least 1 character to search.
destinationSelect.beGapWarning: Backend has not exposed Long id on the destination DTO yet — please input the ID manually for now.

upload.empty: No media yet. Upload files or paste a URL.

upload.beGapWarning: Backend /admin/files/upload is not available yet — please paste the URL directly.

itinerary.subtitle: Each entry represents one day. You can add, remove and re-order them freely.
itinerary.title: Day title

dialog.createSubtitle: Provide the essentials; media and itinerary can be added later.
dialog.editSubtitle: Saved changes will affect the public listing.
dialog.deleteMessage: This will permanently delete "{{name}}". Are you sure?

toast.createFailed: Could not create tour. Please retry.
toast.updateFailed: Could not update tour. Please retry.
toast.deleteFailed: Could not delete tour. Please retry.

validation.codeTooLong: Tour code must not exceed 30 characters.
validation.nameTooLong: Tour name must not exceed 255 characters.
validation.slugFormat: Slug may only contain letters, numbers and dashes.
validation.basePriceMin: From price must be greater than or equal to 0.
validation.currencyFormat: Currency must be a 3-letter ISO code (e.g. VND, USD).
validation.durationDaysRequired: Please enter the number of days.
validation.durationDaysMin: Duration must be at least 1 day.
validation.transportTypeTooLong: Transport type must not exceed 120 characters.
validation.tripModeTooLong: Trip mode must not exceed 50 characters.
validation.mediaTypeTooLong: Media type must not exceed 20 characters.
validation.dayNumberMin: Day index must be at least 1.
validation.dayTitleRequired: Please add a title for this day.
validation.dayTitleTooLong: Day title must not exceed 255 characters.

schedules.empty: This tour has no schedules yet.
schedules.errorMessage: Could not load schedules. Please retry.

status.derivedFull: 'Full' is auto-derived from booked seats vs total capacity.

passenger.subtitle: Set price per passenger type. At least one 'Adult' row is required.
passenger.empty: No price rows yet — please add at least 1 (preferably 'Adult').

dialog.createSubtitle: Provide times, capacity and pricing per passenger type.
dialog.cancelMessage: The schedule will switch to 'Cancelled' status. (Backend has no hard-delete endpoint.) Are you sure?

validation.returnAfterDeparture: Return time must be after departure time.

page.title: Booking management
